GMHUB.Settings.BaseUrl.Name: GMhub Base URL
GMHUB.Settings.BaseUrl.Hint: Root URL of your GMhub web app, e.g. https://gmhub.app
GMHUB.Settings.ApiKey.Name: GMhub Personal Access Token
GMHUB.Settings.ApiKey.Hint: Bearer token from /account/api-tokens. Plaintext starts with gmhub_pat_ and is shown exactly once at issuance.
GMHUB.Settings.CampaignId.Name: GMhub Campaign ID
GMHUB.Settings.CampaignId.Hint: UUID of the GMhub campaign this Foundry world is bound to. Find it in the URL bar on /campaigns/[id].
GMHUB.Settings.SessionRecapCount.Name: Recap sessions to keep
GMHUB.Settings.SessionRecapCount.Hint: How many of the most-recently-ended sessions Pull keeps in Foundry (the recap window). Default 1. Prep and the running session are always kept regardless.
GMHUB.Settings.AutoPush.Name: Auto-push journal updates
GMHUB.Settings.AutoPush.Hint: When enabled, any journal edited in Foundry is pushed to GMhub immediately.
GMHUB.Settings.Mapping.Menu.Name: Player mapping
GMHUB.Settings.Mapping.Menu.Label: Configure player mapping…
GMHUB.Settings.Mapping.Menu.Hint: Map each GMhub player to a Foundry user so the Shared visibility setting lands on the right accounts.
GMHUB.Dialog.NoCampaignBody: Set a Campaign ID in Module Settings to bind this world to a GMhub campaign.
GMHUB.Dialog.NoSessionBody: Pick a prepped session from GMhub to start syncing.
GMHUB.Dialog.LifecycleConfirm.End.Title: End this session?
GMHUB.Dialog.LifecycleConfirm.End.Body: Ending a session is irreversible from Foundry. You can still revisit the recap on GMhub. Continue?
GMHUB.Dialog.PrePushReview.Body: Review every pending change before pushing to GMhub. Click an entry to open it.
GMHUB.Dialog.PrePushReview.QuickNotesHin: Queued offline — sent on this push.
GMHUB.Dialog.PrePushReview.DriftHint: These pages' Foundry visibility differs from what GMhub has. Push won't change it — use Edit visibility to sync.
GMHUB.Dialog.AgendaEditor.Empty: No items yet. Add one to get started.
GMHUB.Dialog.AgendaEditor.NotesPlacehold: Optional GM notes for this scene
GMHUB.Dialog.PlayerMap.Title: GMhub Player Mapping
GMHUB.Dialog.PlayerMap.Body: Map each GMhub player to a Foundry user. Required for the Shared visibility option.
GMHUB.Dialog.PlayerMap.Empty: No players found for this campaign. Invite players in GMhub first.
GMHUB.Dialog.Visibility.Title: Visibility
GMHUB.Dialog.Visibility.Body: Choose who sees this. You'll always see it yourself.
GMHUB.Dialog.Visibility.Empty: This campaign has no members yet.
GMHUB.Dialog.Visibility.RequiresMapping: Some selected players don't have a Foundry user mapping yet — their access won't take effect in this Foundry world until you set the mapping in Module Settings → Configure player mapping.
GMHUB.Dialog.SetupWizard.Title: Get Started with GMhub
GMHUB.Dialog.SetupWizard.Step1Descriptio: Paste your GMhub personal-access token here. Get one at /account/api-tokens.
GMHUB.Dialog.SetupWizard.Step1TokenHint: Your token is shown exactly once when generated. You can always mint a new one at /account/api-tokens.
GMHUB.Dialog.SetupWizard.Step2Descriptio: Select the GMhub campaign you want to sync with this Foundry world.
GMHUB.Dialog.SetupWizard.Step2NoCampaign: No campaigns found. Create one in GMhub first.
GMHUB.Dialog.SetupWizard.Step3Descriptio: Map GMhub players to Foundry users so Shared visibility lands on the right accounts.
GMHUB.Dialog.SetupWizard.Step3Note: You can skip this for now and configure it later in Module Settings.
GMHUB.Dialog.SetupWizard.UnsavedChangesB: You have unsaved configuration. Closing will discard all changes.
GMHUB.Dialog.SetupWizard.Success: Setup complete! You're ready to sync.
GMHUB.Dialog.SetupWizard.IncompleteConfi: Configuration incomplete. Please complete all required steps.
GMHUB.PickSession.Body: Sessions in this campaign that have a session plan.
GMHUB.PickSession.Empty: No sessions found. Create one in GMhub first.
GMHUB.PickSession.NoCampaign: No campaign bound. Set a Campaign ID in Module Settings first.
GMHUB.ConfirmOverwrite.Body: Pulling will overwrite any unpushed local edits in the listed journals.
GMHUB.Notify.AgendaSaved: Saved — push to send to GMhub
GMHUB.Warn.NoSessionsSecrets: Token is missing the sessions:secrets scope — GM Secrets won't sync.
GMHUB.Warn.UnmappedRecipients: {count} GMhub player(s) referenced by visibility lists have no Foundry user mapping: {ids}. Configure them under Module Settings → Configure player mapping.
GMHUB.Scope.entities:read: Read NPCs, locations, factions, items, quests, lore.
GMHUB.Scope.sessions:read: Read sessions and plans (without GM secrets).
GMHUB.Scope.sessions:secrets: Read AND write the GM Secrets page on a session plan. GM-only forever.
GMHUB.Error.401: GMhub rejected the token. Mint a new one at /account/api-tokens and paste it into Module Settings.
GMHUB.Error.401.MissingCredentials: Set your GMhub API key in Module Settings.
GMHUB.Error.403: Your GMhub token is missing the '{scope}' permission.
GMHUB.Error.409.single_active_session: Another session is already running in this campaign. End it before starting a new one.
GMHUB.Error.409.session_ended: That session has ended. Pick a different session.
GMHUB.Error.409.Generic: GMhub flagged a conflict on that operation.
GMHUB.Error.429: GMhub rate limit hit. Try again in {seconds}s.
GMHUB.Error.5xx: GMhub server is having trouble. Try again in a minute.
